sourcePrompt: An M79 "Thumper" 40mm grenade launcher, a stubby single-shot weapon about seventy centimeters long, like an oversized sawn-off shotgun. A short fat smoothbore barrel, hinged open-and-shut at a wide break-action breech, a wooden fore-end under the barrel, a wooden shoulder stock, and a tall flip-up leaf sight near the breech. Walnut wood and dark blued. Low-poly, game-ready, clean hard edges.
